dropzone.title: Drag your .mcworld or .zip files here
dropzone.subtitle: Or use the button below to select files (multiple OK)
dropzone.privacyNote: Files are processed entirely in your browser and never sent to any server
dropzone.folderUnsupported: Folder picker unsupported — use Chrome/Edge or select files directly
dropzone.noWorldsInFolder: No .mcworld files found in that folder

restore.title: Achievement Restorer
restore.subtitle: Upload .mcworld files to auto-analyze, then restore achievements for selected worlds

hero.desc: Restore achievements for Bedrock worlds disabled by Creative mode or cheats. All processing happens in your browser — 100% safe.

local.title: 100% Local Processing
local.desc: All NBT parsing and modification happens in your browser. World files never leave your device.

batch.title: Blazing Fast Batch
batch.desc: Drag & drop multiple .mcworld files to restore them all at once.

nbt.title: Precise NBT Editing
nbt.desc: Only modifies hasBeenLoadedInCreative, cheatsEnabled, and commandsEnabled flags.

safe.title: Safe & Non-Destructive
safe.desc: Existing achievements and world data (db/) are never touched.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.desc: Progressive Web App — works without internet after first visit.

free.title: Free & Open Source
free.desc: MIT License. No signup, no tracking, no ads.
